windows.embed_text_v2: display finished decorative candles, maroon female torso sculpture candles, two-tone cream and maroon pleated fan palm-leaf candle, ribbed teardrop candle, pink yarn ball candle on white fabric, product showcase
windows.summary_v2: A slow panning beauty shot showcases an arrangement of finished decorative candles, including sculptural torso, pleated fan, teardrop and yarn-ball shapes.

seconds_v2.desc: A staged display of finished decorative candles on white draped fabric: a tall ribbed maroon teardrop candle, two maroon female-torso sculptural candles, a large pleated fan/palm-leaf candle that fades cream to maroon, and a pink yarn-ball candle.
Same finished-candle arrangement, the camera slightly closer; the two-tone pleated fan candle is centered with the torso and teardrop candles around it.
Display of the finished candles continues; pleated fan candle, maroon torso candles and pink yarn-ball candle on the white cloth.
Camera pans right, blurring slightly, moving toward a maroon female-torso candle with the pleated fan candle at the left edge.
Pan settles on a maroon female-torso candle standing on the white fabric beside the two-tone pleated fan candle.
The maroon torso candle and pink yarn-ball candle are framed at right, the cream-and-maroon fan candle at left, all finished products.
Final beauty shot of the finished candles: the pleated fan candle, a maroon female-torso candle, and the pink yarn-ball candle on the draped white fabric.
